# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

// main.ts - Deno Deploy application with dynamic module loading plugin system

interface Plugin {
  name: string;
  version?: string;
  init?: () => Promise<void> | void;
  handle?: (request: Request) => Promise<Response | null> | Response | null;
  transform?: (data: unknown) => Promise<unknown> | unknown;
}

interface PluginRegistry {
  [key: string]: Plugin;
}

const loadedPlugins: PluginRegistry = {};
const pluginErrors: Map<string, string> = new Map();

// Allowed module sources for security
const ALLOWED_PREFIXES = [
  "https://deno.land/",
  "https://esm.sh/",
  "https://cdn.skypack.dev/",
  "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/",
  "https://unpkg.com/",
  "./plugins/",
];

function isAllowedModule(path: string): boolean {
  return ALLOWED_PREFIXES.some((prefix) => path.startsWith(prefix));
}

function sanitizeModulePath(path: string): string {
  // Remove any potentially dangerous characters
  return path.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.\/\:\@\?\=\&\+\~]/g, "");
}

async function loadPlugin(
  modulePath: string,
  pluginId: string
): Promise<Plugin | null> {
  const sanitizedPath = sanitizeModulePath(modulePath);

  if (!isAllowedModule(sanitizedPath)) {
    const errorMsg = `Module path not allowed: ${sanitizedPath}. Must start with one of: ${ALLOWED_PREFIXES.join(", ")}`;
    console.error(errorMsg);
    pluginErrors.set(pluginId, errorMsg);
    return null;
  }

  // Return cached plugin if already loaded
  if (loadedPlugins[pluginId]) {
    return loadedPlugins[pluginId];
  }

  try {
    console.log(`Loading plugin "${pluginId}" from: ${sanitizedPath}`);
    const module = await import(sanitizedPath);

    const plugin: Plugin = {
      name: module.name || module.default?.name || pluginId,
      version: module.version || module.default?.version || "unknown",
      init: module.init || module.default?.init,
      handle: module.handle || module.default?.handle,
      transform: module.transform || module.default?.transform,
    };

    // Run plugin initialization if available
    if (plugin.init) {
      await plugin.init();
    }

    loadedPlugins[pluginId] = plugin;
    pluginErrors.delete(pluginId);
    console.log(
      `Plugin "${plugin.name}" v${plugin.version} loaded successfully`
    );
    return plugin;
  } catch (error) {
    const errorMsg = `Failed to load plugin "${pluginId}" from ${sanitizedPath}: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)}`;
    console.error(errorMsg);
    pluginErrors.set(pluginId, errorMsg);
    return null;
  }
}

// Load plugins from environment variables on startup
async function loadEnvPlugins(): Promise<void> {
  // Format: PLUGIN_<ID>=<module_path>
  // Example: PLUGIN_LOGGER=https://esm.sh/my-logger-plugin
  // Also supports PLUGINS=id1:path1,id2:path2

  // Load individual PLUGIN_* env vars
  const envKeys = [
    "PLUGIN_AUTH",
    "PLUGIN_LOGGER",
    "PLUGIN_CACHE",
    "PLUGIN_TRANSFORM",
    "PLUGIN_VALIDATOR",
    "PLUGIN_METRICS",
    "PLUGIN_CORS",
    "PLUGIN_RATELIMIT",
  ];

  for (const key of envKeys) {
    try {
      const value = Deno.env.get(key);
      if (value) {
        const pluginId = key.replace("PLUGIN_", "").toLowerCase();
        await loadPlugin(value, pluginId);
      }
    } catch {
      // Environment variable not set, skip
    }
  }

  // Load from comma-separated PLUGINS env var
  try {
    const pluginsEnv = Deno.env.get("PLUGINS");
    if (pluginsEnv) {
      const pluginEntries = pluginsEnv.split(",").map((e) => e.trim());
      for (const entry of pluginEntries) {
        const [id, ...pathParts] = entry.split(":");
        const path = pathParts.join(":"); // Rejoin in case URL contains ':'
        if (id && path) {
          await loadPlugin(path, id.trim());
        }
      }
    }
  } catch {
    // PLUGINS env var not set, skip
  }
}

// Initialize env plugins
await loadEnvPlugins();

async function handlePluginRoute(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(request.url);

  // GET /plugins - List all loaded plugins
  if (request.method === "GET" && url.pathname === "/plugins") {
    const pluginList = Object.entries(loadedPlugins).map(([id, plugin]) => ({
      id,
      name: plugin.name,
      version: plugin.version,
      hasHandler: !!plugin.handle,
      hasTransform: !!plugin.transform,
    }));

    const errors = Object.fromEntries(pluginErrors);

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ plugins: pluginList, errors, count: pluginList.length }, null, 2),
      {
        headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
      }
    );
  }

  // POST /plugins/load - Dynamically load a plugin
  if (request.method === "POST" && url.pathname === "/plugins/load") {
    try {
      const body = await request.json();
      const { id, path } = body as { id?: string; path?: string };

      if (!id || !path) {
        return new Response(
          JSON.stringify({
            error: "Both 'id' and 'path' are required in the request body",
          }),
          { status: 400, headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }
        );
      }

      const plugin = await loadPlugin(path, id);

      if (plugin) {
        return new Response(
          JSON.stringify({
            success: true,
            plugin: {
              id,
              name: plugin.name,
              version: plugin.version,
              hasHandler: !!plugin.handle,
              hasTransform: !!plugin.transform,
            },
          }),
          { headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }
        );
      } else {
        return new Response(
          JSON.stringify({
            success: false,
            error: pluginErrors.get(id) || "Unknown error loading plugin",
          }),
          { status: 400, headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }
        );
      }
    } catch (error) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          error: `Invalid request: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)}`,
        }),
        { status: 400, headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }
      );
    }
  }

  // DELETE /plugins/:id - Unload a plugin
  if (request.method === "DELETE" && url.pathname.startsWith("/plugins/")) {
    const pluginId = url.pathname.split("/plugins/")[1];
    if (pluginId && loadedPlugins[pluginId]) {
      delete loadedPlugins[pluginId];
      pluginErrors.delete(pluginId);
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: `Plugin "${pluginId}" unloaded` }),
        { headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }
      );
    }
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: `Plugin "${pluginId}" not found` }),
      { status: 404, headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }
    );
  }

  return new Response(null, { status: 404 });
}

async function handleLoadViaQuery(request: Request): Promise<Response | null> {
  const url = new URL(request.url);

  // Load plugin via query parameters: ?load_plugin=id:path
  const loadParam = url.searchParams.get("load_plugin");
  if (loadParam) {
    const [id, ...pathParts] = loadParam.split(":");
    const path = pathParts.join(":");
    if (id && path) {
      const plugin = await loadPlugin(path, id);
      if (plugin) {
        return new Response(
          JSON.stringify({
            success: true,
            message: `Plugin "${id}" loaded via query parameter`,
            plugin: { id, name: plugin.name, version: plugin.version },
          }),
          { headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }
        );
      } else {
        return new Response(
          JSON.stringify({
            success: false,
            error: pluginErrors.get(id) || "Failed to load plugin",
          }),
          { status: 400, headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }
        );
      }
    }
  }

  return null;
}

async function executePluginPipeline(
  request: Request
): Promise<Response | null> {
  // Execute plugin handlers in order
  for (const [id, plugin] of Object.entries(loadedPlugins)) {
    if (plugin.handle) {
      try {
        const response = await plugin.handle(request);
        if (response) {
          console.log(`Request handled by plugin "${id}"`);
          return response;
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error(
          `Plugin "${id}" handler error: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)}`
        );
      }
    }
  }
  return null;
}

async function handleTransform(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  if (request.method !== "POST") {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: "POST method required for /transform" }),
      { status: 405, headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }
    );
  }

  try {
    let data: unknown = await request.json();

    const url = new URL(request.url);
    const pluginIds = url.searchParams.get("plugins")?.split(",") || Object.keys(loadedPlugins);

    const appliedTransforms: string[] = [];

    for (const id of pluginIds) {
      const trimmedId = id.trim();
      const plugin = loadedPlugins[trimmedId];
      if (plugin?.transform) {
        try {
          data = await plugin.transform(data);
          appliedTransforms.push(trimmedId);
        } catch (error) {
          console.error(
            `Transform error in plugin "${trimmedId}": ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)}`
          );
        }
      }
    }

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        result: data,
        appliedTransforms,
      }, null, 2),
      { headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }
    );
  } catch (error) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        error: `Transform failed: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)}`,
      }),
      { status: 400, headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }
    );
  }
}

Deno.serve(async (request: Request): Promise<Response> => {
  const url = new URL(request.url);

  try {
    // Check for query parameter plugin loading
    const queryResponse = await handleLoadViaQuery(request);
    if (queryResponse) {
      return queryResponse;
    }

    // Plugin management routes
    if (url.pathname.startsWith("/plugins")) {
      return await handlePluginRoute(request);
    }

    // Transform endpoint - runs data through plugin transform pipeline
    if (url.pathname === "/transform") {
      return await handleTransform(request);
    }

    // Execute plugin pipeline - let plugins handle the request
    const pluginResponse = await executePluginPipeline(request);
    if (pluginResponse) {
      return pluginResponse;
    }

    // Health check
    if (url.pathname === "/health") {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          status: "healthy",
          loadedPlugins: Object.keys(loadedPlugins).length,
          timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
        }),
        { headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }
      );
    }

    // Default route - show API documentation
    if (url.pathname === "/") {
      const docs = {
        name: "Deno Deploy Plugin System",
        description:
          "Dynamically load and manage plugins via environment variables, query parameters, or API calls",
        endpoints: {
          "GET /": "This documentation",
          "GET /health": "Health check with plugin count",
          "GET /plugins": "List all loaded plugins and any errors",
          "POST /plugins/load":
            'Load a plugin dynamically. Body: {"id": "my-plugin", "path": "https://esm.sh/my-module"}',
          "DELETE /plugins/:id": "Unload a plugin by ID",
          "POST /transform":
            "Run data through plugin transform pipeline. Optional query: ?plugins=id1,id2",
          "GET /?load_plugin=id:https://esm.sh/module":
            "Load plugin via query parameter",
        },
        pluginInterface: {
          name: "string (required)",
          version: "string (optional)",
          "init()": "Called when plugin is loaded (optional)",
          "handle(request: Request)":
            "Handle incoming requests, return Response or null (optional)",
          "transform(data: unknown)":
            "Transform data in the pipeline (optional)",
        },
        configuration: {
          "Environment Variables": {
            "PLUGIN_<ID>": "Module path for a plugin (e.g., PLUGIN_LOGGER=https://esm.sh/my-logger)",
            PLUGINS: "Comma-separated list of id:path pairs",
          },
        },
        allowedModuleSources: ALLOWED_PREFIXES,
        loadedPlugins: Object.entries(loadedPlugins).map(([id, p]) => ({
          id,
          name: p.name,
          version: p.version,
        })),
      };

      return new Response(JSON.stringify(docs, null, 2), {
        headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
      });
    }

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: "Not found", path: url.pathname }),
      { status: 404, headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }
    );
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(
      `Server error: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)}`
    );
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        error: "Internal server error",
        message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
      }),
      { status: 500, headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }
    );
  }
});
